prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body portrait of Lin Siyuan, a young male chef with an extremely handsome face and high intellect, standing centered against a pure white background. He has a gentle and refined temperament with a slightly weary expression, showcasing his low stamina. His features are delicate and clear, with fair skin, sharp yet tired eyes behind black-framed glasses, and a focused gaze. He has clean, short black hair. His slender and thin build is clad in a pristine white chef's uniform. The overall impression is one of a talented but physically fragile individual in the competitive culinary world, captured in an Impressionist oil painting style with rich play of light and shadow and visible brushstrokes., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
